_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular conformation of the full-length tumor suppressor NF2/Merlin--a small-angle neutron scattering study.

_contextSnippet: The 3-D shapes of d Merlin(wt) and d Merlin(S518D), and that of d Ezrin reconstructed from SANS using the program DAMMIN
details: Successfully reconstructed 3-D shapes of Merlin(wt) and Merlin(S518D) from SANS data, showing overall closed conformations similar to Ezrin
